overall.description: Game engine footage from a truck simulator showing a Mercedes Actros driving through heavy snowfall on highways and through an industrial area. The driver overtakes several trucks before slowing down for traffic lights and navigating warehouse districts.

events.description: overtaking KRONE trailer truck on the right side
overtaking Audi trailer truck on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on snowy highway, overtaking slower trucks in the right lane

notable_agents.action: KRONE trailer truck driving ahead in the right lane
Audi trailer truck driving in the right lane being overtaken

entered.detail: interior dashboard of Mercedes Actros with instrument cluster and controls
windshield covered with snowflakes and wiper marks
white semi-trailer with blue KRONE logo
white semi-trailer with black Audi rings logo
metal guardrail along the left side of the highway
dense pine trees covered in snow lining the highway
dense pine trees covered in snow lining the highway

segments.scene_description: Driving on a snow-covered highway with dense forests on both sides. The Mercedes truck overtakes two large trailers - a KRONE truck and an Audi truck - while maintaining steady speed on the slippery asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp approaching industrial district

events.description: passing blue VARŠUVA directional sign indicating approach to industrial area
slowing down and stopping behind trucks at red traffic light

agents.ego_description: slowing down on highway exit ramp, approaching traffic light behind other trucks

notable_agents.action: truck stopped ahead at the red traffic light

entered.detail: blue highway directional sign with white text VARŠUVA
large gray industrial warehouse building with flat roof
traffic signal assembly showing red light

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the forested highway to an industrial area, passing the VARŠUVA sign. The truck slows down and stops at a red traffic light behind other trucks, with large industrial warehouses visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse district with loading areas

events.description: traffic light turns green and truck begins moving forward through industrial area
navigating gentle turns through industrial streets lined with warehouses

agents.ego_description: driving slowly through industrial area, following truck ahead through intersections

notable_agents.action: truck ahead moving slowly through the industrial zone

entered.detail: large yellow industrial warehouse building with multiple loading bays
chain link fence along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: Proceeding through the industrial warehouse district after the light turns green. The truck navigates past a prominent yellow warehouse and follows the vehicle ahead through the snow-covered industrial streets.

events.description: making left turn at traffic light intersection in industrial area
passing circular speed limit sign indicating 60 km/h on the right

agents.ego_description: navigating left turn at intersection, then accelerating on wider road with snow-covered trees

entered.detail: circular white speed limit sign with red border showing 60
traffic light pole with signals at the intersection
snow-covered trees reappearing along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: Making a left turn at a traffic light intersection within the industrial zone. After the turn, the truck passes a 60 km/h speed limit sign and continues along a road where snow-covered forests begin to reappear on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a Mercedes truck travels from a secluded, snow-covered highway into a bustling industrial district. It begins by cruising through a dense, wintry forest, where the truck maintains a steady speed on slippery asphalt while overtaking a KRONE trailer and an Audi truck. As the forested landscape recedes, the camera passes a VARŠUVA sign, marking the transition from the wilderness to an urban environment. The scene then shifts toward an industrial zone, where the truck slows its pace and comes to a halt at a red traffic light behind a queue of other vehicles. Finally, the view opens up to reveal large industrial warehouses lining the right side of the road under the heavy snowfall.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy industrial district that gradually transitions into a forested roadside environment. It begins as the truck proceeds through a warehouse district after a light turns green, navigating past a prominent yellow building while following the vehicle ahead. As the truck reaches a traffic light intersection, the camera tracks a left turn that leads the vehicle away from the dense industrial structures. The scene then shifts as the truck passes a 60 km/h speed limit sign, with the urban landscape giving way to snow-covered forests appearing on the right side of the road.
